hotel_name: Biệt Thự & Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng Sun Spa (Sun Spa Resort & Villa)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel was poorly maintenance. Breakfast buffet was limited and poor quality. Overall bad experience, booked for three nights and checked out after first night!
reviews.response:
Dear Sir and Madame,
Thank you for stay in Sun Spa Resort and review us. We will try harder to improve the quality. Your reviews will help us to look over things again and improve the service. Have a good day. Best reagards, Sales and Marketing Team - Sun Spa Resort

reviews.title: A great place to stay if you are in Dong Hoi going to the Caves.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was very good- lots of choice. Beautiful pool and ocean front location. Initially I did not like my ocean/pool view room because it looked onto a large courtyard first. But I was moved to B block and it was so much nicer with pool/ocean view.
reviews.negatives: Paid shuttle to the hotel would be helpful.

reviews.title: ok location but very bad customer service
reviews.text: Hotel has a nice beach however its customer service are really bad. The staffs seem to ignore every customers's requests and do not want them to come back. Hotel may be couple of ages but it has cheap facilities and many of them are broken. I was locked in bathroom for more than a hour due to broken door locker.
reviews.positives: ok breakfast

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sea front and quiet. It was very quiet and empty (winter is the off season)
reviews.negatives: The resort needs an update.. Old bathtubs in the bathrooms, paint peeling in some places in the resort. It's nice, but it has seen better days. Also, some of the staff did not seem too happy to be there.

reviews.title: Nothing included
reviews.text: The list of amenities is long, but don’t be fooled, nothing is included for free. The hot tub is part of the spa and you have to pay about $7 for 30 minutes. The place was dead here in winter and there was nothing to do for free during our stay. It was cold and rainy so all swimming activities weren’t running. There was barely anyone in the hotel, yet they gave us a room with a key that didn’t work. When the worker tried to fix it, the whole room smelled like chemicals and they told us to open the windows. We requested a new room. They didn’t appologize and no one there spoke much English. The place was nice, but we could have stayed anywhere else for a fraction of the price and felt like we got a better value.

reviews.title: I had a great holiday with my family at sun spa
reviews.positives: great restaurant, great staffs.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Past its prime.
reviews.text: Locate in good location but the resort surely past its prime. Lots of sign of wear and tear and badly need proper maintenance. Breakfast provided was not good and few selections. Ok for an overnight stay but should look for other hotel options in the area.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Private beach
reviews.negatives: Toilet could have been better

reviews.title: Bad smells from the toilet
reviews.text: After checked in, we found the toilet in our room was broken, causing dirty water to leak from the toilet onto the floor. The smell was extremely unpleasant and we couldn’t stand it. We called the hotel reception to ask for help. The housekeeping staff came and what she could do at that time was to spray deodorant, using the scent of essential oils to cover up the foul smell from the leaking toilet. Dirty water didn’t stop leaking, and the bad smell was still there. We really couldn’t stand the bad smell mixed with the scent of essential oils, but we were so tired after 2 days of hiking in the forest, then we could only close the bathroom door to reduce the bad smell and go to sleep. We had a very bad experience that night. This is hard to accept because we think the hotel should check the room condition before guests check in. This is a five star hotel. We were so disappointed and sorry for the hotel. They have a beautiful beach but the management still has a lot to improve.

reviews.title: I recently stayed at your resort and overall had a pleasant experience
reviews.positives:
I had a wonderful stay at the resort and was truly impressed by the overall atmosphere and design. The fresh air and peaceful surroundings created a perfect escape from the busy city. The green lawn was beautifully maintained and the green trees added a natural charm that made the whole environment feel refreshing and relaxing.
The swimming pool was clean and well-designed, offering a great place to unwind. The resort’s layout was thoughtfully planned with every facility easily accessible.
Being located right by a clean, serene beach was a huge bonus. The staff also deserve special mention — everyone was friendly, professional, and always ready to help with a smile.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast should be improved. The selection was limited, the quality of the food did not meet expectations. Compared to the high standards of the other resort services, the breakfast experience felt underwhelming.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The resort is too old and needs improvement. The SPA is very nice!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: You have everything here, perfect beach, not crowded, excellent staff. They help us deal with our daughter's injuries (outside the hotel).

The yoga mat seems to be not clean.

reviews.title: Great beach badly managed
reviews.text:
The beach is wonderful and the water clean but the management very bad. I had to move several times from problematic rooms due to works and noise until I was offered an upgrade for a great villa.  Bad breakfast is served in an ugly internal room and not by the sea, the restaurant, service and food is bad. They serve food and salads much different than suggested in the menu and add loads of peanuts and pork where it is not supposed to be not considering that people may dislike those ingredients for various reasons.
I had to remind the staff three times over three days until a bad smelling dead dog washed ashore by the sea in front of « my » villa was finally removed.

reviews.title: Used, overpriced, dirty sea
reviews.text:
The room was ok, not nice, but ok. Used, dusty, dark. Don't buy the sea view - no sense in it, you will see only a pool and a tiny hardly recognizable peace of the sea. Food was bad.  The beach was not nice as well, the water was dirty.
The pool looks great but most time it's too crowded there.
The only cool thing there was a SPA in 5 start area, the massage was done in a really professional way and the price was quite cheap! (Well, it's cheaper in Hanoi, of course, but for the hotel spa - the price was really reasonable).

reviews.title: Unfriendly staff
reviews.text: From the moment of check-in and throughout the stay, all the staff including booking, reception, and security exhibited a dismissive attitude towards customers, as if everything was supposed to be like that. The reception staff rushed ahead with luggage, disregarding customers who had not even parked their cars yet, failing to introduce anything about the accommodation or services. The receptionists worked unprofessionally and half-heartedly. When parking in the lobby to leave, security closed the car door while guests were still trying to get in. The staff was very poor, and there was truly no genuine welcoming smile.

reviews.title: lowered expectations
reviews.text:
the hotel is in a small town in Vietnam and the locals are extremely relaxed and slow paced, just due to the way of living there.
so if you are someone who is used to a fast paced environment then generally any place in this town will seem slow.
the staff are friendly, the resort is adequate.
nothing outstanding
reviews.positives: location, nice pool, nice beach

reviews.title: Gute Lage und Ausstattung, Service noch verbesserungsfähig
reviews.positives:
Das Resort ist sehr weitläufig und schön. Einige Gebäude wirken von außen angegriffen  aber bei 7 Monaten Regenzeit ist das normal. Innen ist alles sehr schön!
Die verschiedenen Pools verteilen sich sehr gut über das Resort.
Transport von entfernt gelegenen Bungalows und Villen zur Reception und Restaurants klappt einwandfrei mit den Elektrotransportern.
Die Villa mit eigenem Pool und direktem Meerblick war sehr schön. Es war ein geräumiges Zimmer mit sehr schönem Bad. Nur in der Bezeichnung des Resorts Villa genannt.
Frühstücks Buffet war gut. Nur, für einen vietnamesischen Kaffee extra zahlen zu müssen, hat überrascht.
reviews.negatives:
Privatatmosphäre im eigenen, gemieteten Bereich gibt es nicht!
Permanent, also wirklich jedesmal wurde der Aussen-Bereich der Villa zur Erledigung von Reparatur arbeiten betreten. Ohne vorherige Anmeldung oder Abstimmung.
Die auch lauten Arbeiten begannen bereits morgens um 06h!!!
Nach Rückkehr von Ausflügen gegen 18:30h, waren dann andere Arbeiten begonnen.
Für ein nach eigener Bewertung 5 Sterne Ressort geht das gar nicht!!

Zum Abschluss dann, nach nicht eben geringen auch zusätzliche Kosten neben der Übernachtung, wurden wir dann tatsächlich noch kurz vor Einsteigen ins Auto von 3 Servicekräften gebeten, den letzten Kaffee des Frühstücks zu bezahlen. Die Übermittlung vom Restaurant an die Rezeption habe so lang gedauert. Ich habe das als unangemessen und etwas peinlich empfunden.....

reviews.title: a great place spoilt by poor staff performance
reviews.text: this hotel is in a great beach location. lovely clean swimming pools and spacious grounds to relax in. we had a mostly enjoyable stay which, unfortunately, was spoilt by two things - the english language skills of most of the staff were not sufficient to understand and answer questions satisfactorily, hence we were given incorrect information on several occasions. in an international hotel of this grade it would be appropriate to have at least one member of staff available, on all shifts, who had sufficient english to deal with problems and questions as they arose. the other problem is that, despite "no smoking" notices in the hotel restaurant guests who wished to smoke there were provided with ashtrays, allowed to smoke next to non-smoking diners (despite the large restaurant being almost empty), and no apologies or other action taken to deal with the situation. when my husband asked if the men in question were policemen he was told "yes" - either the staff member in question had poor understanding of english or he was admitting to a situation which might not appeal to all nationalities and cultures. because of these issues i would not recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: the beach, large comfortable room and buffet breakfast

reviews.text:
My family came here for 2 nights when there was a typhoon going on (in Oct). The beach was quite windy, wavy and water quality was just totally grey. So the farest we can do was enjoy photographing. Restaurant (may be because of the low season) did not offer as much as stated in their menu, 5 out of our 10 orders were not in service.

However, we find the resort is one of the best in the area already. We do enjoy the spa for its service and the price. Very reasonalble for a 5 stars resort.

Also - during my stay there was a lot of work going on at the beach and it was quite a lot of rubbish lying around which no one seemed to be bothered about. I would not expect to see broken bottles and a dead cat on a beach belonging to a 5 star hotel... Spa is good but I was not let out until I promised to leave a tip which was a bit uncomfortable and awkward. Still - the value for money is great and I would recommend this place, as long as you do not expect ultra luxury just a really nice hotel at the beach with awesome views, decent rooms and good food

The bedroom is large and clean, and the service staff is attentive; however, since it was built quite a long time ago, the equipment is not modern, but it still works well. However, the room rate is still high compared to many places, even though I went during the low season and received a significant discount. I may return here when I have the chance.

reviews.text:
A PEACEFUL PLACE AS BEAUTIFUL AS A FAIRY TALE BUT WITH VERY FEW CHECK-INs IN SAPA

Suối Vàng - Thác Tình Yêu Sapa Ecotourism Area
(Hoàng Liên National Park)

📍Address: Located at Trạm Tôn - Núi Xẻ, San Sả Hồ commune, at the foot of Ô Quy Hồ pass

Best check-in time: In the morning or afternoon when the sunlight is still shining through the leaves, creating wonderful effects for photos.

🛵Guide to get to Suối Vàng - Thác Tình Yêu
About 15km from the center of Sapa, heading southwest, you just need to drive along National Highway 4D towards Lai Châu. About 3km from Ô Quy Hồ pass, after entering Hoàng Liên Sơn National Park, walk 200m to reach the Suối Vàng - Thác Tình Yêu ecotourism area.

reviews.title: Médiocre
reviews.text:
Par où commencer? Du meilleur au pire...
1) l’emplacement du complexe: extraordinaire! sur la pointe de la péninsule, avec une belle plage de sable blond ...propre! une rareté au Vietnam...malheureusement. 
2) la chambre : grande et lumineuseavec un lit très confortable. Dommage que la salle de bain soit si moche et désuète. Il serait plus que temps que la hauteur des pommeaux de douche soient adaptés aux personnes mesurant plus de 1m60!!!
3) le personnel : peu expérimenté et beaucoup trop nombreux alors que le site est pratiquement vide! Ça donnait une impression d’être constamment surveillé!
4) la nourriture : épouvantable! Franchement mauvais, sans aucun raffinement alors que les mets vietnamiens sont si délectables...même pas capable d’offrir une Phở qui a de l’allure...!!!
Dernier point : l’offre de massage. Bien que ça coûte peu cher, il y a tout de même moyen d’offrir de la qualité!
Bref, nous en étions au point d’avoir hâte de quitter les lieux (d’autant que le temps était pourri!...dommages car le site est vraiment splendide!
reviews.response:
Dear Marie-Jose, 
Thank you for your choosing of Sun Spa Resort.
Firstly, we really apologise so much when you feel not satisfed at our resort. We are very grateful about your comments which help us to improve the services are still not good.
We will convey your comments to our management.
We hope you will come back next time in order to we have a chance to serve you more and more better.
Thank you so much and have a good day.

また利用客のベトナム人も大音量のディスコ音楽を夜中までドアを開け放して流していて雰囲気台無しです。

また世界遺産のフォンニャケバンツアーも財テク一人1万円からじっくりみたいツアーだと2万円以上します。

朝食は種類が豊富で満足。
スタッフの対応はイマイチ。美味しいレストランを聞いても、ホテル内が一番！市内観光を聞いても、市内は何もないからホテル滞在がベスト。と言った感じ。市内観光は確かにその通りだったが、2km離れた海鮮レストランはとても美味しかった。

reviews.title: 동허이 시내에서는 제일 괜찮은 호텔
reviews.text:
공항에서 호텔까지 약 15분 정도 (16만동-약 8천원) 걸리고, 위치는 시내 중심에서 녓레강을 건너편에 있기 때문에 다리를 건너야 해서 아주 편리한 편은 아니나, 감수할 수 있는 수준임.
직원들과는 영어로 의사소통하는데 무리가 없으며, 
방 자체는 크고 시설도 나쁘지 않음.
다만 복도에 깔려있는 카펫트가 깨끗하지는 않음.
조식은 그럭저럭 먹을만 함. 다른 시에 있는 4성급 호텔과 비교하면 약간 떨어지는 수준.
그러나 동허이에 몇개 없는 큰 호텔(4성 이상) 중 제일 나은 호텔인듯.
reviews.positives: 비치,크기,의사소통
